description: Create a conditional mail merge document for university admissions using the data source at /home/ga/Documents/applicants.csv. The letter template must include the applicant's Name and Address block. Use conditional logic based on the 'Decision' column: if 'Admit', display "Congratulations! I am pleased to inform you that you have been admitted to the [Program] program for the Fall 2026 semester."; if 'Deny', display "Thank you for your interest in our university. After careful review of your application, we regret to inform you that we are unable to offer you admission at this time." Merge the document to a single file and save it as /home/ga/Documents/decision_letters.odt.

metadata.admit_text_start: Congratulations! I am pleased to inform you
